TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: pintriqan_Mngciq_(Toba)大豹社事件
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == ki'an rhzyal 區域範圍 == . plaw mciriq . mrhuw tgleng 領導者 qlupun Gipun Taywan Iga pgluw zyaw kshat 'mubuy ayung na Theluw ru kagak klahang " ri ban". 1900 kawas mzyup qyunam Msbtunux ru qmul matuk knus. 6 byacing sehu atuk knus m'apal kneril qalang. mtluhing kwara tayal smyuk mihiy. 8 byacing Sotokubu tmu hetay musa pciriq mpux squ tayal ka qutux phaban sa Mngciq, Msbtunux, M'utu. sgleng na mrhuw Watan Amuy mhtuy Urpun. musa mihiy hmiriq pcyogan atuk knus. kmut squliq Gipun ki sehu kaki kbhul msyaw squliq. memaw si hakas malax spciriq pssum ma Sotoku Taywan 佐久間佐馬太 mk_yaya mita hetay mciriq squ qalang Topa. kahul Toyen ru 深坑 na hetay Gipun mtbozyak kmikil mciriq. pcingan cinriqan memaw ungat nniqun ru tutu patus na Tayal ru mgyay shriq sa kinhulan Topa. tlqing squ zik rgyax Qlamay, Sbunaw, Tkasan sazing kawas Iga, mbzinah musa tmwang kraya Ilyung Hbun tqalang qani. i 1923 kawas shriq Topa tmwang qalang binah. aring sqani Iga " smkongat qalang Topa" skahul squ biru patas ru lalu bkgan binkesan wal soman la. ru psmagun tayal " Msbtunux" la. kahul baqun wal laqux Gipun qu Topa Iga, memaw mngungu ru ani sbalay muci kwara ggluw Msbtunux. Gipun uzi yasa thoyay mhung qnhut qmiway sa Msbtunux, Tranan, tta Giran Parisa. 於1923 隘勇線.
S.PHON: == kiʔan rħzjal **** == . plaw mʦ~ʨiriq . mrħuw tɣleŋ *** qlupun ɣipun tajwan iɣa pɣluw zjaw ks~ɕħat ʔmuβuj ajuŋ na tħeluw ru kaɣak klaħaŋ " ri βan". **** kawas~ɕ mzjup qjunam ms~ɕβtunux ru qmul matuk knus~ɕ. * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕeħu atuk knus~ɕ mʔapal kneril qalaŋ. mtluħiŋ kwara tajal s~ɕmjuk miħij. * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕotokuβu tmu ħetaj mus~ɕa pʦ~ʨiriq mpux s~ɕqu tajal ka qutux pħaβan s~ɕa mŋʦ~ʨiq, ms~ɕβtunux, mʔutu. s~ɕɣleŋ na mrħuw watan amuj mħtuj urpun. mus~ɕa miħij ħmiriq pʦ~ʨjoɣan atuk knus~ɕ. kmut s~ɕquliq ɣipun ki s~ɕeħu kaki kβħul ms~ɕjaw s~ɕquliq. memaw s~ɕi ħakas~ɕ malax s~ɕpʦ~ʨiriq ps~ɕs~ɕum ma s~ɕotoku tajwan ****** mkəjaja mita ħetaj mʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕqu qalaŋ topa. kaħul tojen ru ** na ħetaj ɣipun mtβozjak kmikil mʦ~ʨiriq. pʦ~ʨiŋan ʦ~ʨinriqan memaw uŋat nniqun ru tutu patus~ɕ na tajal ru mɣjaj s~ɕħriq s~ɕa kinħulan topa. tlqiŋ s~ɕqu zik rɣjax qlamaj, s~ɕβunaw, tkas~ɕan s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ iɣa, mβzinaħ mus~ɕa tmwaŋ kraja iljuŋ ħβun tqalaŋ qani. i **** kawas~ɕ s~ɕħriq topa tmwaŋ qalaŋ βinaħ. ariŋ s~ɕqani iɣa " s~ɕmkoŋat qalaŋ topa" s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu βiru patas~ɕ ru lalu βkɣan βinkes~ɕan wal s~ɕoman la. ru ps~ɕmaɣun tajal " ms~ɕβtunux" la. kaħul βaqun wal laqux ɣipun qu topa iɣa, memaw mŋuŋu ru ani s~ɕβalaj muʦ~ʨi kwara ɣɣluw ms~ɕβtunux. ɣipun uzi jas~ɕa tħojaj mħuŋ qnħut qmiwaj s~ɕa ms~ɕβtunux, tranan, tta ɣiran paris~ɕa. ***** ***.
S.FORM: == ki'an rhzyal 區域範圍 == . plaw mciriq . mrhuw tgleng 領導者 qlupun Gipun Taywan Iga pgluw zyaw kshat 'mubuy ayung na Theluw ru kagak klahang " ri ban". 1900 kawas mzyup qyunam Msbtunux ru qmul matuk knus. 6 byacing sehu atuk knus m'apal kneril qalang. mtluhing kwara tayal smyuk mihiy. 8 byacing Sotokubu tmu hetay musa pciriq mpux squ tayal ka qutux phaban sa Mngciq, Msbtunux, M'utu. sgleng na mrhuw Watan Amuy mhtuy Urpun. musa mihiy hmiriq pcyogan atuk knus. kmut squliq Gipun ki sehu kaki kbhul msyaw squliq. memaw si hakas malax spciriq pssum ma Sotoku Taywan 佐久間佐馬太 mk_yaya mita hetay mciriq squ qalang Topa. kahul Toyen ru 深坑 na hetay Gipun mtbozyak kmikil mciriq. pcingan cinriqan memaw ungat nniqun ru tutu patus na Tayal ru mgyay shriq sa kinhulan Topa. tlqing squ zik rgyax Qlamay, Sbunaw, Tkasan sazing kawas Iga, mbzinah musa tmwang kraya Ilyung Hbun tqalang qani. i 1923 kawas shriq Topa tmwang qalang binah. aring sqani Iga " smkongat qalang Topa" skahul squ biru patas ru lalu bkgan binkesan wal soman la. ru psmagun tayal " Msbtunux" la. kahul baqun wal laqux Gipun qu Topa Iga, memaw mngungu ru ani sbalay muci kwara ggluw Msbtunux. Gipun uzi yasa thoyay mhung qnhut qmiway sa Msbtunux, Tranan, tta Giran Parisa. 於1923 隘勇線.
S.PHON: == kiʔan rħzjal **** == . plaw mʦ~ʨiriq . mrħuw tɣleŋ *** qlupun ɣipun tajwan iɣa pɣluw zjaw ks~ɕħat ʔmuβuj ajuŋ na tħeluw ru kaɣak klaħaŋ " ri βan". **** kawas~ɕ mzjup qjunam ms~ɕβtunux ru qmul matuk knus~ɕ. * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕeħu atuk knus~ɕ mʔapal kneril qalaŋ. mtluħiŋ kwara tajal s~ɕmjuk miħij. * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕotokuβu tmu ħetaj mus~ɕa pʦ~ʨiriq mpux s~ɕqu tajal ka qutux pħaβan s~ɕa mŋʦ~ʨiq, ms~ɕβtunux, mʔutu. s~ɕɣleŋ na mrħuw watan amuj mħtuj urpun. mus~ɕa miħij ħmiriq pʦ~ʨjoɣan atuk knus~ɕ. kmut s~ɕquliq ɣipun ki s~ɕeħu kaki kβħul ms~ɕjaw s~ɕquliq. memaw s~ɕi ħakas~ɕ malax s~ɕpʦ~ʨiriq ps~ɕs~ɕum ma s~ɕotoku tajwan ****** mkəjaja mita ħetaj mʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕqu qalaŋ topa. kaħul tojen ru ** na ħetaj ɣipun mtβozjak kmikil mʦ~ʨiriq. pʦ~ʨiŋan ʦ~ʨinriqan memaw uŋat nniqun ru tutu patus~ɕ na tajal ru mɣjaj s~ɕħriq s~ɕa kinħulan topa. tlqiŋ s~ɕqu zik rɣjax qlamaj, s~ɕβunaw, tkas~ɕan s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ iɣa, mβzinaħ mus~ɕa tmwaŋ kraja iljuŋ ħβun tqalaŋ qani. i **** kawas~ɕ s~ɕħriq topa tmwaŋ qalaŋ βinaħ. ariŋ s~ɕqani iɣa " s~ɕmkoŋat qalaŋ topa" s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu βiru patas~ɕ ru lalu βkɣan βinkes~ɕan wal s~ɕoman la. ru ps~ɕmaɣun tajal " ms~ɕβtunux" la. kaħul βaqun wal laqux ɣipun qu topa iɣa, memaw mŋuŋu ru ani s~ɕβalaj muʦ~ʨi kwara ɣɣluw ms~ɕβtunux. ɣipun uzi jas~ɕa tħojaj mħuŋ qnħut qmiwaj s~ɕa ms~ɕβtunux, tranan, tta ɣiran paris~ɕa. ***** ***.
